projects.name: License Plate Detection System
projects.description: High-accuracy Computer Vision system for license plate detection and vehicle occupancy monitoring, built in collaboration with Kerala Police Control. Achieved 92.79% accuracy with adversarial attack mitigation and environmental noise handling.

projects.name: Car Wash Management Platform
projects.description: Comprehensive workshop management platform with admin dashboard for task verification, staff tracking, and automated report generation. Integrated real-time availability and task management into a unified web interface.

projects.name: AI Hydroponics System
projects.description: AI-driven prototype for automated hydroponics using real-time sensor data, built for a Netherlands-based client. Deep learning model predicts nutrient uptake values by bridging hardware sensors with predictive software analysis.

projects.name: AI Drug Discovery Research
projects.description: Bioinformatics R&D contribution at UL Research focused on AI-driven drug discovery. Collaborated on multi-modal architectures to improve prediction reliability for healthcare applications.

projects.name: TrackHire — AI Job Application Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack AI-powered job tracker built with Next.js and Supabase. Paste any job description to get instant skill extraction, a tailored cover letter, and a resume fit score — powered by Llama 3 via OpenRouter.
